reviews.why: SAME union refuted by skeptic (fail-close): All three refs (AAA evA4, BBB evB4, DDD evC3) name the same reusable cause: the market crude oil price rising as a fuel-cost input. Object/metric identical (crude oil price), scope identical (global commodity price, no narrowing), mechanism identical (higher oil price -> higher fuel/freight costs; the specific cost line affected is downstream evidence, not the driver). Matches DriverOntology R5's canonical familiar name oil_price.
